name: Serina Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Serina Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing drug candidates using its proprietary POZ polymer delivery technology, primarily for neurological diseases like Parkinson's disease.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing a pipeline of wholly-owned drug product candidates to treat neurological diseases and other indications.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance of IND for SER-252
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we received FDA clearance of IND application for our lead product candidate, SER-252 for the treatment of advanced Parkinson's disease.

catalysts.event: First patient dosed in Phase 1b trial for SER-252
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we enrolled and dosed our first patient in our Phase 1b clinical trial for SER-252.

catalysts.event: FDA clinical hold on SER-252 IND
catalysts.sentence: On November 3, 2025, we announced that we received a notice from the FDA, placing a clinical hold on our IND application for SER-252.
